title: karpatiosorbus borosiana
intro: Karpatiosorbus borosiana, also known as Hungarian mountain ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Eastern Europe, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Karpatiosorbus borosiana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The plant is used in herbal preparations, including infusions, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
